name: browser-tools
description: Secure browser and API automation tools for Azure AI Foundry Agent Service

functions.name: navigate_page
functions.description: Navigate to a URL in the enterprise browser

functions.name: extract_content
functions.description: Extract structured content from the current browser page

functions.name: fill_form
functions.description: Fill form fields on the current browser page (requires approval)

functions.name: submit_action
functions.description: Submit a form or trigger an action (requires approval)

functions.name: discover_apis
functions.description: Discover REST/GraphQL API endpoints for a target application

functions.name: capture_screenshot
functions.description: Capture a screenshot of the current browser page or element

functions.name: orchestrate_workflow
functions.description: Execute a multi-step workflow across multiple skills

functions.name: send_teams_message
functions.description: Send a message to a Teams chat or channel via Microsoft Graph

functions.name: create_adaptive_card
functions.description: Create and send an Adaptive Card to Teams

functions.name: manage_calendar
functions.description: Create or modify Outlook calendar events via Microsoft Graph

functions.name: analyze_work_patterns
functions.description: Analyze work patterns and productivity insights
